parameters."},"SwapObserved(uint256,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted inside react() when a swap is processed."}},"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Comprehensive Foundry test for the YieldScout Reactive Contract. \u2500\u2500 Test Architecture Note \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 YieldScout extends AbstractReactive. Its `react()` is gated by `vmOnly`, which requires `vm == true`. In a Foundry test the system contract at 0xfffFfF has no code, so `detectVm()` sets `vm = true`. This means `react()` is callable in tests, while subscriptions in the constructor are skipped (gated by `!vm`) \u2014 avoiding calls to the undeployed system contract. \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 Test Cases:   1.  testConstructorState              \u2014 Verify initial state is set correctly.   2.  testReactLocalSwapAccumulates     \u2014 react() updates localCumulativeVolume for local pool.   3.  testReactSourceSwapAccumulates    \u2014 react() updates cumulativeVolume for source pool.   4.  testNoTriggerBelowThreshold       \u2014 No Callback when source yield < threshold.   5.  testNoTriggerBelowMinSwapCount    \u2014 No Callback when source pool has < 3 swaps.   6.  testCallbackEmittedAboveThreshold \u2014 Callback emitted when source yield >> local.   7.  testSwapObservedEmitted           \u2014 SwapObserved event emitted on every react().   8.  testUpdateStrategy                \u2014 AI agent can update yield threshold + confidence.   9.  testUpdateStrategyOnlyOwner       \u2014 Random address cannot call updateStrategy.   10. testUpdateLocalPool              \u2014 Owner can update local pool reference.   11. testYieldVelocityComparison      \u2014 View function returns correct source/local ratio.   12. testWouldTriggerRebalance        \u2014 View predicts rebalance correctly.   13. testTransferOwnership            \u2014 Ownership transfer works correctly.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"test/YieldScout.t.sol":"YieldScoutTest"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"none"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@ensdomains/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/node_modules/@ensdomains/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/uniswap-hooks/=lib/uniswap-hooks/",":@reactive-lib/=lib/reactive-lib/src/",":@reactive/=lib/reactive-lib/src/",":@uniswap/v4-core/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/",":@uniswap/v4-periphery/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/",":ds-test/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-gas-snapshot/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/lib/forge-gas-snapshot/src/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/node_modules/hardhat/",":hookmate/=lib/hookmate/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":permit2/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/",":reactive-lib/=lib/reactive-lib/src/",":solmate/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/lib/solmate/",":uniswap-hooks/=lib/uniswap-hooks/src/",":v4-core/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-core/",":v4-periphery/=lib/uniswap-hooks/lib/v4-periphery/"]},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/Base.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa3735a6618a3014e42bb4329ad143e3b2c59cd95094350202e4c4a06c9d585dd","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://eef9db48d94726ec3d3fa3a84a8d520903705190f7ee7a04a065335a6aeeac4d","dweb:/ipfs/QmSWmNny7TkzyqRPjGdpERAJuBwwznrGPLUqS4DZy5fX5z"]},"lib/forge-std/src/StdAssertions.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd8eec16034b53b52c90a3d720e121ce7d30d64cc57d854db7d817d5b382dda43","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://612780755
